channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping - near Wharton, 25th June
item.description:
Large amount of fly-tipped waste behind garages, including wooden pallets, a mattress, polystyrene packaging, and other discarded materials. Please arrange for the rubbish to be removed, it has been there for well over a month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Millstream Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass needs cutting, 25th June
item.description:
The grass the length of Cray Avenue needs mowing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Avenue, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: NW6 7QN Jules House, 25th June
item.description:
From our windows, we have a continuous, direct view of the illegal dumping ground your tenants are operating in the communal bin area of Jules House. As shown in the attached files the area is currently blocked by a discarded mattress, commercial cardboard, and bulk debris. This is not an occasional issue; it is a persistent, unmanaged eyesore that directly infringes upon our legal rights. Our Position and Rights: Statutory Nuisance: This continuous fly-tipping constitutes a Statutory Nuisance under Section 79 of the Environmental Protection Act 1990, creating immediate health, vermin, and pest hazards on our boundary. Loss of Quiet Enjoyment: Your failure to manage Jules House forces a severe, distressing visual blight directly onto our freehold property. Arson & Fire Risk: Leaving highly combustible bulk items directly beneath residential windows presents an immediate, unacceptable safety hazard to the entire neighborhood.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: Potential blocked drains, 25th June
item.description:
We are having an issue with water/drainage going down our kitchen sink, we have changed the piping under the sink but the water doesn't drain, this might be an outside issue where the pipes are clogged. Can someone please contact me to see what can be done, as this is a health & safety issue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haldane Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bin and rubbish, 25th June
item.description:
There is an anonymous black bin which has been left on the pavement for weeks. It does not belong to any of the flats around the area. This bin is now being used as a public dumping group. Please can you remove it and the rubbish bags around it?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mortimer Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown weeds and shrubbery in open space, 25th June
item.description:
Resident reporting at the rear of his garden there is a lot of overgrown weeds and shrubbery & other shrubbery and it been used as a dumping ground there are fence panels and other household items, disposable BBG and the ground has burnt. Resident reporting his back fence has been pulled down the shrubbery grows into the fence and now come over into the garden.. Resident cuts it back from his side but now it is very thick. Please could someone look into this asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Old Manor Way, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed car parked in permitted parking bay, 25th June
item.description:
There is a untaxed, silver Ford Focus that has been left in a parking bay since early April. It seems to be abandoned as it has not moved. It is also in a permitted parking bay, taking vital space that households on the street use for parking their cars.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stamford Grove East, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose kerbstone, 25th June
item.description:
The kerbstone on the edge of the drop curb is loose and raised, which could become a hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elsa Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike nest covered in tags, 25th June
item.description:
In Carew St. outside end of leisure centre

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carew Street, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plastic wheeled baby walker dumped, 25th June
item.description:
A pink and white plastic baby walker with wheels has been dumped on the pavement on Palmers Road N11, just short of the first entrance to Arnos Court flats. It has been there at least two weeks....
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bowes Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 206 - 208, Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London

item.title: 3 bags of meat or offal dumped., 25th June
item.description:
3 bags of old meat or animal offal have been dumped on the grass verge. They are an immediate health hazard. Nearest house is no.2 Lyme Farm Road SE12

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lyme Farm Road, Eltham

item.title: Residential waste plus black bags, 25th June
